Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the DOCUMENT_IMPORT table, which can retrieve unnecessary data and impact performance. Consider using select() with only the specific columns needed for the DtoDocumentImport mapping.

Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the DOCUMENT_IMPORT_CHUNK table, which may include columns not needed for the DTO. Consider using select() with explicit column references to fetch only the required fields.

Using `selectFrom(VECTOR_STORE)` fetches all columns from the VECTOR_STORE table, but only ID, CONTENT, and METADATA are actually used. Explicitly select only the required columns using `dsl.select(VECTOR_STORE.ID, VECTOR_STORE.CONTENT, VECTOR_STORE.METADATA).from(VECTOR_STORE)`.
